title: Shri Kaalratri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Kaalratri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Kaalratri.
description:
Om Jai Kaalratri Mata,
Maiya Jai Kaalratri Mata.
Saatve Navratre tere,
Pooje sab jag daata॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

Maiya Kaal roop mein tu hi,
Vikraal roop dharti.
Dushton ka naash kare,
Sab peeda harti॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

Teri jyoti se chamke,
Saara jag ujiyaara.
Bhakton pe kripa drishti,
Kar do maiya nyara॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

Jai Mahakali maiya,
Mahamaya Jagdambe.
Bhay binshani tu hi,
Kasht hare ambe॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

Nirbal ko bal deti,
Dhan-vaibhav ki daata.
Jo man se kare aarti,
Dukh-bhram sab jaata॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

Bhakt tere dar aaye,
Lekar man mein aasha.
Poori kar de maiya,
Sab bhakton ki abhilasha॥
॥ Om Jai Kaalratri Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Kaalratri's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Kaalratri is the destroyer of darkness and negativity. Her Aarti helps in removing fear, evil influences, and enemies. She protects her devotees and grants them fearlessness (Abhay).
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The seventh day of Navratri (Saptami) is dedicated to Maa Kaalratri and is considered the most auspicious for her worship and Aarti.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Kaalratri during Aarti?
faq.a3: Jaggery (Gur) is considered very dear to Maa Kaalratri.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion and a calm mind in the home temple on the seventh day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Kaalratryai Namah' after the Aarti is the best practice to make the mind fearless and peaceful.
